topics: Generalized block diagram of Instrumentation system
Static and Dynamic characteristics of transducers
Errors in measurements and its analysis. Measurement of resistance, capacitance and inductance: DC and AC bridges
Maxwell's inductance bridge and Maxwell's inductance capacitance bridge
Measuring circuits and applications of Resistance transducers: Potentiometer
Strain gauge (gauge factor derivation), Strain gauge Load Cell, Resistance thermometer (2 wire, 3 wire & 4 wire), Thermistor
Capacitive transducers: Variable air gap, Variable Area, Variable permittivity
Types and Applications of Thermocouple (cold junction compensation)
Opto-electric Transducers: Photodiode, Phototransistor, Photoconductive cell, LDR
Non-Contact type transducers: Infrared, Ultrasonic proximity sensors, Microwave Level Switches, Optical level sensor, Ultrasonic level sensor
Working and Torque equations of PMMC
Instrument Transformers: Current Transformer, Potential Transformer
Peak response voltmeter, True RMS meter, Q meter, Strip chart recorder, XY Plotter

Suggestion on Project Topics: 1. The project proposal submitted by each group (4 to 8 students) must include a measurement system, which can be either analog or digital. 2. The sensor calibration is mandatory. 3. Students can incorporate suitable signal conditioning circuits, communication standards or display devices in the project work. They can evaluate the outputs and run necessary analytics on the data generated. 4. Sample projects: a. Implementation of a temperature transducer for low temperature measurement b. Wind measurement system using anemometers c. Vibration measurement using accelerometers
